text:
Sure! How about this?

Once upon a rainy evening. Timmy looked skyward seeing some birds goosing about. Thought he’d think owl thoughts.

“I’d love one owl owl owl!”

He’d think maybe owl thoughts.

He watched some. Owls think weird thoughts.

Thinking owl thoughts.

Suddenly. Owls swoop.

Thinking owls thought.

Just a strange night.

Did you enjoy?

Yes owl love.


Just say owl.

That's ok.


Just think owl.

Just owl thoughts.


That would wow.

I think owls watch.







I love owls.



Oh owl?


Just think owl.



Oh yes. Owls.


Just say owl.

I think owl.



I love owl thoughts.



That owl knows.



Just say owl.



That's good stuff.




Just owl.

That's owl love.



Oh owl.




That was owl.


Just owl wow.



That owl.




Just owl.

It loves.

That's owl.That.







You love owls.




That's okay.




Just owl.
